test.create_query: CREATE TABLE rdf_triples ( subject String, predicate LowCardinality(String), object String, INDEX idx_subject subject TYPE bloom_filter GRANULARITY 4, INDEX idx_object object TYPE bloom_filter GRANULARITY 4 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (predicate, subject, object)
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':p', toString(number)), 'rdf:type', ':Person' FROM numbers(500000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':p', toString(number)), ':name', concat('Person_', toString(number)) FROM numbers(500000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':p', toString(number)), ':age', toString(18 + number % 60) FROM numbers(500000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':p', toString(number)), ':score', toString(number % 100) FROM numbers(500000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':p', toString(number)), ':email', concat('p', toString(number), '@example.com') FROM numbers(250000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?age WHERE { ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:age> ?age } ORDER BY ?age LIMIT 10') FORMAT Null

SELECT t1.object AS name, t2.object AS age FROM rdf_triples AS t1 PREWHERE t1.predicate = ':name' JOIN rdf_triples AS t2 ON t2.subject = t1.subject WHERE t2.predicate = ':age' ORDER BY age LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT DISTINCT ?age WHERE { ?p <:age> ?age }') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT DISTINCT ?age WHERE { ?p <:age> ?age } ORDER BY ?age LIMIT 10') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?email WHERE { ?p <:name> ?name . OPTIONAL { ?p <:email> ?email } } ORDER BY ?name LIMIT 100') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?score WHERE { ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:score> ?score . FILTER (?score > 90) } ORDER BY ?name LIMIT 50') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?age WHERE { ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:age> ?age }') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?age WHERE { ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:age> ?age } LIMIT 1000') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?age ?score WHERE { ?p <rdf:type> <:Person> . ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:age> ?age . ?p <:score> ?score }') FORMAT Null

SELECT t2.object AS name, t3.object AS age, t4.object AS score FROM rdf_triples AS t1 PREWHERE t1.predicate = 'rdf:type' JOIN rdf_triples AS t2 ON t2.subject = t1.subject JOIN rdf_triples AS t3 ON t3.subject = t1.subject JOIN rdf_triples AS t4 ON t4.subject = t1.subject WHERE t1.object = ':Person' AND t2.predicate = ':name' AND t3.predicate = ':age' AND t4.predicate = ':score' FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?email WHERE { ?p <rdf:type> <:Person> . ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:age> ?age . OPTIONAL { ?p <:email> ?email } . FILTER(?age > 50) }') FORMAT Null

SELECT t2.object AS name, t4.object AS email FROM rdf_triples AS t1 PREWHERE t1.predicate = 'rdf:type' JOIN rdf_triples AS t2 ON t2.subject = t1.subject JOIN rdf_triples AS t3 ON t3.subject = t1.subject LEFT JOIN rdf_triples AS t4 ON t4.subject = t1.subject AND t4.predicate = ':email' WHERE t1.object = ':Person' AND t2.predicate = ':name' AND t3.predicate = ':age' AND toInt64OrNull(t3.object) > 50 FORMAT Null
